message:
style(web): fix container overflow in RepresentationLadder and missing imports

- Prevented text from spilling out of its bounds in RepresentationLadder by removing explicit absolute positioning and using flexible flex-row/col structures with minimum heights.

- Fixed missing Users import in SwarmExecutionViz.

- Confirmed the codebase successfully passes typecheck and lint.
